## New device checklist

If you are adding a device, please confirm:

- [ ] Created `content/<slug>.md`, using `content/hak5-rubber-ducky.md` as a template
- [ ] Front matter has `title`, `date`, `tags`, `description`, and `image`
- [ ] Body has the standard sections: Device Instance Path, VendorID, ProductID, Class, Author, Sigma Rules, Links
- [ ] Added the device photo under `static/images/`
- [ ] Added the device to `hardwares.json` (`title`, `date`, `instancePath`, `author`)
- [ ] Set `draft: false` so the page is published
